channel.title: Science & Research on Dyson Sphere Program Guide
channel.description: Recent content in Science & Research on Dyson Sphere Program Guide

item.title: DSP 60 Science Per Minute Blueprint (v0.10) - Full Production Ratios From Raw Materials to All Science
item.description:
Short answer: 60 SPM (all six science types) requires: 120 Iron Ore/min, 60 Copper Ore/min, 30 Coal/min, 30 Crude Oil/min, plus off-world Titanium and Silicon.

Iron ore

Copper ore
Total about 30 assemblers, 40 smelters, and 15 chemical plants. The single most important ratio is 3 Blue : 3 Red : 6 Yellow : 8 Purple : 12 Green : 15 White assemblers.

Science production is measured in science per minute (SPM). 60 SPM is the standard mid-game target - achievable on a single planet, enough to research most technologies at a reasonable pace. This guide covers every production chain from raw materials to completed science matrices.

item.title: DSP Green Science Deep Dive (v0.10) - Casimir Crystals, Quantum Chips and Full Production Chain
item.description:
Short answer: Green Science (Gravity Matrix) needs Casimir Crystals, Quantum Chips, and Graviton Lenses. The Casimir Crystal chain is the hardest - it consumes massive Hydrogen and Graphene. Build dedicated Hydrogen processing before scaling green science, or hydrogen backup will halt your entire factory.

Gravity Matrix is the fifth science tier. It unlocks Warpers (interstellar travel), Plane Smelters, Artificial Stars, and the endgame research tree. Green science is where factory design separates casual players from experts - the chain complexity rivals everything before it combined.

item.title: DSP Purple Science Guide (v0.10) - Build a Complete Structure Matrix Production Line
item.description:
Short answer: Purple Science (Structure Matrix) needs Frame Material + Diamond + Titanium Glass. The bottleneck is always Titanium Crystal and Deuterium. Build dedicated production for these two first, then chain Frame Material + Diamond + Glass into the matrix assemblers.

Purple Science is the fourth science tier in DSP, unlocking Mk.III assemblers, Plane Smelters, advanced logistics, and endgame buildings. The jump from Yellow to Purple is the biggest difficulty spike in the research tree because it introduces three new production chains simultaneously.

item.title: DSP Research Lab Guide (v0.10) - Automate Red to Purple Science Without Hand-Feeding
item.description:
Research is the clock in DSP. Every unlock — new buildings, new recipes, new logistics options — lives behind the research tree. And research lives behind science packs. If your science pack production is weak, your entire progression grinds to a halt.

This guide covers the complete science pack chain from Red Science to Purple Science, lab setup ratios, power requirements, and which research priorities actually matter for your factory's next phase.
